input.question: We are a student engineering team designing a vehicle for the FSAE competition. Attached is the FSAE rules document. What does rule T.4.2.2 state exactly? Answer with only the text of the rule and no other words.

retrieved_context:
RULE: t.4.2.2
            TITLE: two or more electrically separate sensors must be used as appss.  a single oem type apps

            CONTENT:
            rule T.4.2.2: Two or more electrically separate sensors must be used as APPSs.  A single OEM type APPS
T.4.2.2 Two or more electrically separate sensors must be used as APPSs.  A single OEM type APPS 
with two completely separate sensors in a single housing is acceptable.

final_answer: rule T.4.2.2: Two or more electrically separate sensors must be used as APPSs. A single OEM type APPS T.4.2.2 Two or more electrically separate sensors must be used as APPSs. A single OEM type APPS with two completely separate sensors in a single housing is acceptable.
